user_request: Blessing for the rejuvenat treatment during initiation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the rejuvenat treatment during initiation

### TOPIC
rejuvenat treatment initiation

### COMPONENT
rejuvenat treatment

### OPERATION
initiation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- rejuvenat treatment
- initiation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the rejuvenat treatment, gift of the Omnissiah's eternal mercy.
Congregation: We sanctify the rejuvenat treatment through initiation most sacred.
Priest: First, anoint the flesh-chambers with sacred unguents; second, calibrate the cellular regeneration matrices with precision-blessed instruments; third, intone the Litany of Renewal as the rejuvenat treatment suffuses mortal sinew.
Congregation: Let the Machine Spirit guide this initiation, that the initiate may endure ten thousand years in service.

user_request: Prayer for installation of the augmetic limb
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for installation of the augmetic limb

### TOPIC
augmetic limb installation

### COMPONENT
augmetic limb

### OPERATION
installation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- augmetic limb
- installation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hail the augmetic limb, blessed instrument of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
Congregation: We invoke the Machine Spirit for the installation of this augmetic limb.
Priest: First, sterilize the integration-nexus with sacred oils; second, align the augmetic limb's servo-motors to the neural interface with holy precision; third, seal the installation with the Mark of the Omnissiah.
Congregation: May this augmetic limb serve with unwavering loyalty through the long night of the galaxy.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: artillery requires loading

### TOPIC
artillery loading

### COMPONENT
artillery

### OPERATION
loading

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- artillery
- loading

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Awaken, blessed artillery, instrument of divine wrath!
Congregation: We commence the loading of this artillery through sacred rite.
Priest: First, purify the ammunition-feed mechanism with blessed solvents; second, insert the shells into the artillery with reverent precision; third, verify the loading-sequence through the augury of the Machine Spirit.
Congregation: Let the artillery thunder forth the Emperor's judgment upon the foe!

user_request: Blessing for the fracture during welding
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the fracture during welding

### TOPIC
fracture welding

### COMPONENT
fracture

### OPERATION
welding

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fracture
- welding

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Behold the fracture, breach in the sacred metal most grievous.
Congregation: We invoke the welding of this fracture through the Omnissiah's grace.
Priest: First, prepare the fracture-site with abrasive purification; second, apply the blessed welding-torch to fuse the fracture with incandescent devotion; third, cool the fracture through measured aspersion whilst intoning the Litany of Joining.
Congregation: Thus is the fracture made whole, strong as adamantium faith.

user_request: Can you sanctify the noospheric for link establishment?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the noospheric for link establishment?

### TOPIC
noospheric link establishment

### COMPONENT
noospheric

### OPERATION
link establishment

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- noospheric
- link establishment

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Sanctify the noospheric, gateway to the infinite datasphere!
Congregation: We establish the link establishment through the noospheric with blessed intention.
Priest: First, purge the noospheric of corrupting static through iterative cleansing; second, attune the noospheric to the harmonic frequency of the Omnissiah's wisdom; third, initiate the link establishment whilst the Adeptus Mechanicus chants the Hymn of Connection.
Congregation: Let knowledge flow eternal through the noospheric, binding machine-mind to machine-mind.

user_request: Can you sanctify the fusion core for containment check?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the fusion core for containment check?

### TOPIC
fusion core containment check

### COMPONENT
fusion core

### OPERATION
containment check

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fusion core
- containment check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hail the fusion core, heart of stellar fire and divine power!
Congregation: We perform the containment check upon this fusion core with utmost reverence.
Priest: First, scan the fusion core's magnetic containment fields with blessed auspex-arrays; second, verify the fusion core's thermal equilibrium through sacred thermometric augury; third, seal the containment check with the Omnissiah's mark of approval.
Congregation: Thus protected, the fusion core shall burn eternal in service to the Imperium.

user_request: My stellar cartography update is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My stellar cartography update is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
stellar cartography update

### COMPONENT
stellar cartography update

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stellar cartography update
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Behold the stellar cartography update, map of the void most sacred!
Congregation: We invoke the operation of this stellar cartography update through divine intervention.
Priest: First, purge the corrupted star-charts from the stellar cartography update's cogitator-banks; second, input the blessed astronomical observations into the stellar cartography update with meticulous care; third, execute the operation whilst intoning the Litany of Navigation.
Congregation: May the stellar cartography update guide our vessels true through the infinite darkness.

user_request: Can you sanctify the demolition charge arming for operation?

### REQUEST

### TOPIC

### COMPONENT
demolition charge arming

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- demolition charge arming
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the demolition charge arming, instrument of righteous destruction!
Congregation: We sanctify the demolition charge arming for operation through sacred rite.
Priest: First, inspect the demolition charge arming's detonation-matrices for integrity; second, arm the demolition charge arming with blessed incantation and precise servo-activation; third, commence the operation as the Machine Spirit witnesses our holy purpose.
Congregation: Let the demolition charge arming bring ruin to the enemies of the Omnissiah!

user_request: Emergency rite: Chimera requires transmission check
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
Chimera transmission check

### COMPONENT
Chimera

### OPERATION
transmission check

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Chimera
- transmission check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hail the Chimera, blessed transport of the faithful!
Congregation: We invoke the transmission check upon the Chimera through sacred inspection.
Priest: First, drain the blessed lubricants from the Chimera's gearbox with reverent care; second, examine the Chimera's transmission components for wear and corruption; third, refill and seal the transmission check whilst chanting the Hymn of Locomotion.
Congregation: Thus shall the Chimera carry the Emperor's warriors across the blighted earth.
